__readme__: Plot availability overrides. Any plot NOT listed here is AVAILABLE (متاح). To mark a plot RESERVED (محجوز), add one line:  "<zone_id>-<plot>": "reserved"  — for example  "3625-100": "reserved". The exact line to paste is shown in each plot's popup when you are signed in as admin. Save the file; it takes effect on the next page load — no redeploy and no cache wait needed (you can edit it directly on the server). Keys starting with _ are ignored.
